calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Reinstate Lawsuits Per Ccp 473, 2010 Chapter 2 Judgment Upon Failure To Answer Per Ccp Section 414.10 Service Of A Summons And Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. SEAN P. MORIARTY OF THE LAW OFFICES OF CESARI, WERNER AND MORIARTY, TEL. NO. 391-1113 X 15 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ANDRE PETTERSON'S Motion To Reinstate Lawsuits Per CCP 473, 2010 Chapter 2 Judgment Upon Failure To Answer Per CCP Section 414.10 Service Of A Summons And Complaint is Denied. Plaintiff has shown no grounds why default should be entered or why the May 31, 2012 order dismissing this case with prejudice should be set aside. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to send by way of e-mail to the court) Judge: Harold Kahn Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported.

Notice Of Motion To Reinstate Lawsuits Per Ccp 473, 2010 Chapter 2 Judgment Upon Failure To Answer Per Ccp Section 414.10 Service Of A Summons And Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-20-2012 Continued To Oct-04-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ANDRE PETTERSON'S Motion To Reinstate Lawsuits Per CCP 473, 2010 Chapter 2 Judgment Upon Failure To Answer Per CCP Section 414.10 Service Of A Summons And Complaint is Continued on the court's own motion to October 4, 2012 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. The parties are to provide courtesy copies of all papers filed in support and opposition to the motion, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, to Department 302 no later than September 25, 2012 at 4:00 pm. Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Complaint
Off Calendar May-31-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOSE ANTHONY MONTALVO OF THE LAW OFFICES OF CESARI, WERNER AND MORIARTY, TEL. NO. 391-1113 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS DIEGO RIOS, DEANNA CRESPO AND RACHIALLE FRANKLIN'S Motion To Dismiss Complaint with Prejudice is Granted. No opposition filed. Even if plaintiff's unfiled application for a default judgment were construed as an opposition to this motion, that opposition lacks merit. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. = (302/HEK)
